upcomingEvents.title: SACRA Annual Anesthesia Research Symposium
upcomingEvents.speaker: Keynote: Dr. Sarah Jenkins & Global Student Presenters
upcomingEvents.description: Our flagship research event featuring student abstract presentations, clinical breakout panels, and an expert discussion on modern airway modeling methods. Registration includes certificate of attendance.

upcomingEvents.title: Clinical Simulation Workshop: Crisis Resource Management
upcomingEvents.speaker: Prof. Marcus Vance & Clinical Sim Educators
upcomingEvents.description: An interactive, hands-on crisis simulation lab focusing on perioperative emergencies, team-based communication, and resuscitation protocols. Seats are strictly limited to 20 students.

upcomingEvents.title: Introduction to Systematic Reviews in Anesthesia
upcomingEvents.speaker: Dr. Kenji Tanaka & Dr. Lisa Chen
upcomingEvents.description: A comprehensive introductory webinar detailing how to formulate search strategies, register protocols, screen abstracts, and perform risk-of-bias audits for anesthesia studies.

pastEvents.title: Regional Anesthesia & Ultrasound-Guided Blocks Workshop
pastEvents.summary: Hands-on needle pathway visualization and nerve identification practice using state-of-the-art ultrasound machines.

pastEvents.title: International Collaboration Project: Airway Safety Audit
pastEvents.summary: Presentation of aggregated results from 14 global medical schools auditing compliance rates for pre-induction checks.

pastEvents.title: Pediatric Sedation Protocols & Patient Outreach Campaign
pastEvents.summary: Educational drive educating local health clinics on safe sedation guidelines and monitoring checklists.
